lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Masterful strategy! Flawless execution! The way you fought, like a hammer striking metal, fierce and unstoppable!
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Here, Challenger. Take the first Medal of Prestige, the Ironheart Medal.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Putini, did you catch all that? Learned a thing or two?
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige
All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: No, no, no! I meant you could stand to learn a thing or two from this fine challenger about playing Peaks of Prestige!
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Fine, fine... After dueling a beast like that, I reckon today wasn't wasted.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Challenger, the next Lord of Prestige awaits you on the other end of the city.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: With your skill, you just might climb all the way to Apex Duelist! Hahaha!
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Hold on, Putini! I just had a brilliant idea. How 'bout you and I play a round? If you win—
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige
